step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("current surgical guidelines for managing liver hydatid cysts and associated anaphylaxis risks")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First state if you agree/disagree with prior conclusions, then write up to two sentences explaining why. End with your selected answer in boxed notation.
\boxed{}
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I agree with the prior conclusion that fear of anaphylactic shock does not discourage surgeons from adopting percutaneous or laparoscopic techniques for liver hydatid cysts. While rupture of a hydatid cyst can theoretically lead to anaphylactic shock, current guidelines emphasize strict procedural controls—including ultrasound guidance, pre-procedural medication regimens, and immediate preparedness—to manage this risk safely and effectively. As a result, these minimally invasive techniques remain standard-of-care choices despite acknowledged theoretical dangers.
$\boxed{\text{B}}$
